title: Motor Vehicle Census, Australia, 31 Jan 2021
notes: Final ABS Motor Vehicle Census release; useful for stock validation by vehicle type and fuel type.

title: Fuel-hungry utes and SUVs dominate Australian sales, with Corolla the only small car on top 10 list
notes: Reports 2024 total new vehicle sales, broad segment shares, and EV share.

title: Petrol, diesel car sales slip against EVs
notes: Reports AAA Q2 2024 fuel-type shares and counts for EVs and hybrids.

title: Plug-in electric vehicles in Australia
notes: Useful index of annual EV totals and references; should be backfilled from original linked articles.

title: EVs reach highest ever Aussie market share amid fuel supply concerns
notes: Search snippet reports March 2026 BEV sales and market share from VFACTS.

title: Wave of new EVs to hit Melbourne
notes: Search snippet reports March 2026 BEV sales and plug-in share.

title: Tesla Model Y now Australia's best-selling vehicle
notes: Search snippet reports May 2026 EV sales, EV share, and electrified-vehicle share from VFACTS.

title: Top 100 most popular cars in Australia in 2024: best-selling vehicles
notes: Reports 2024 top 100 model sales, vehicle types, total market, and selected model powertrain details from VFACTS.

title: VFACTS: Australia's 2021 new car sales detailed in full
notes: Reports 2021 total market, category breakdown, fuel breakdown, buyer type, regions, and top models from VFACTS.

title: VFACTS: Australia's new car sales results for 2022
notes: Reports 2022 total market, category breakdown, fuel breakdown, buyer type, regions, and top models from VFACTS.

title: VFACTS 2023: All-time Australian sales record, Ford Ranger tops charts
notes: Reports 2023 total market, category breakdown, fuel breakdown, buyer type, regions, EV-specific top sellers, and top models from VFACTS.

title: Top 100 new cars sold in Australia in 2020
notes: Reports 2020 top 100 model sales from VFACTS. Notes Tesla sales are not included in VFACTS.

title: Top 100 new cars sold in Australia in 2019
notes: Reports 2019 top 100 model sales from VFACTS.

title: VFACTS 2025: Another record year for new vehicle sales in Australia, but growth modest overall
notes: Reports 2025 total market, category breakdown, fuel breakdown, brands, segment leaders, and top models from FCAI/Electric Vehicle Council data.

title: April new car sales 2026: EV sales soar to one in eight while Toyota RAV4 lands back on the throne
notes: Reports April 2026 monthly and YTD total/fuel/model observations from FCAI and Electric Vehicle Council data.

title: MAY 2026 new car sales: Tesla Model Y claims top spot while Chinese-brand sales surge hitting Toyota and Ford
notes: Reports May 2026 monthly top model and brand observations, plus selected YTD brand observations.

title: Electric Vehicle Index
notes: Public dashboard. Page states data may be used with AAA attribution and linkback. Public GraphQL endpoint exposes state, vehicle type, manufacturer, model, fuel type, and quarterly sales counts from Q1 2022 to Q1 2026; embedded Google Sheets CSV fallback inspected only covered Q1 2022 to Q1 2024.

title: Record Sales Year for 2016 Flags Dramatic Shift in Buyer Preferences
notes: Reports 2016 total market, SUV share, light-commercial share, brand/model leaders, and buyer-type changes from VFACTS.

title: SUVs set to topple passenger cars
notes: Reports 2016 passenger and SUV annual sales plus selected fuel observations from VFACTS.

title: Be alert but not alarmed: Part Two
notes: Reports VFACTS 2017 and 2018 vehicle-class totals and passenger/SUV fuel split table.

title: New vehicle sales down in challenging 2019 market
notes: Reports 2019 total market, class shares, and year-on-year movements by vehicle class from VFACTS.

title: Market Insight: Hybrids gather pace
notes: Reports 2018 and 2019 hybrid totals, 2019 Toyota hybrid count, and plug-in market context from VFACTS.

title: VFACTS: Australia's new vehicle sales at their lowest since 2003
notes: Reports 2020 total market, class shares, fuel totals, top models, buyer type, and state totals from FCAI/VFACTS.

title: EV Index Registration Data 2021-2025
notes: Public AAA EV Index workbook. Provides postcode/state/fuel registration stock as at 31 January for 2021-2025; fuel categories are BEV, Hybrid/PHEV, and ICE.
